title: NIT Rourkela Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Junior Research Fellow Posts
description: National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Junior Research Fellow Posts. Candidates with M.E/M. Tech can grab this chance and apply for the NIT Rourkela Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by the last date for applications. If you are looking for more,...
